actions.autogenNoProvider: No AI model available — add and enable an AI provider in Settings first
actions.deleteWithFiles: Also delete files in the directory

connector.addCredential: Add a credential (self-built app: App ID + App Secret)
connector.attachIncomplete: Select a credential and enter a space ID
connector.credFormIncomplete: Fill in the name, App ID and App Secret
connector.detachConfirm: Disconnect this connector? Synced snapshots are kept.
connector.feishuDesc: Sync pages from a Feishu Wiki space into this base as snapshots.
connector.noCredentials: No Feishu credentials yet — add one below
connector.title: Source connectors

control.applyNote: Changes take effect the next time the session starts a task (sends a message).
control.discoverHint: Mount a knowledge base here — let the model consult your domain knowledge anytime.
control.eagernessAggressiveHint: Bold: whenever something relates to a base, the model writes it — facts, decisions, snippets, gotchas. Prefers over-capturing to losing knowledge; you prune later.
control.eagernessConservativeHint: Restrained: persist only knowledge with clear long-term value; when in doubt, skip it. Filters out trivial, one-off, and redundant material.
control.enabledOk: Knowledge mounting enabled — takes effect on the next message
control.hint: Mount knowledge bases into this session: they appear under .nomi/knowledge/ in the workspace as an extended knowledge source.
control.label: Knowledge
control.modeDirectHint: The session may create/edit documents in the base directly. Note: concurrent sessions writing the same base risk write conflicts.
control.modeStagedHint: New knowledge goes only into the base's _inbox/<session>/ staging folder — zero conflicts across concurrent sessions; review and merge it whenever you like.
control.noBases: No knowledge bases yet — create one on the Knowledge page first
control.pickFirst: Select at least one knowledge base first
control.writebackHint: Allow the session to persist new knowledge as md files into the bases

detail.deletePlaceholder: Use the Settings tab to delete

inbox.bannerDesc: With "write-back · staged" enabled, new knowledge learned by the model lands here for your review before entering the base.
inbox.bannerTitle: The AI deposited {{count}} new piece(s) of knowledge — awaiting your review

settings.deleteLocalHint: (the referenced local directory will not be deleted)
settings.deleteLocalNote: The external directory referenced by this base ({{path}}) will not be deleted — only the association is removed.
settings.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. All documents, pending items, and mount bindings will be removed.
settings.descPlaceholder: Briefly describe the content and purpose
settings.purgeOption: Also delete the data directory on disk
settings.webHint: Web source — click "Refresh" to re-fetch all URLs.

use.cliDesc: Inject a read-only knowledge_search tool into claude / codex / gemini with one click, so CLI agents can also query this base. Use the "Connect Knowledge" button on the Terminal page.
use.mountHint: Mounting is done from the session side — open any conversation / terminal / companion, click the knowledge-base button, and mount this base.
use.step1Desc: Mount a base onto a session / terminal / companion and it becomes extended knowledge there. One base can serve many.
use.step2Desc: The model searches .nomi/knowledge/ on demand; matched content informs answers without stuffing the full text into context.
use.step3Desc: With write-back on, new knowledge from a session can be staged in "Inbox" for your review — the base grows over time.
use.writebackDesc: Write-back mode is set per-workspace in each session's mount control — it is not a single global toggle. Each mount can independently choose:
use.writebackDirectDesc: Model writes to the base directly — fits personal use / companions
use.writebackStagedDesc: New knowledge goes to "Inbox" first; you confirm before merging (recommended)

empty.importDesktopOnly: Import is only available on desktop

form.descriptionPlaceholder: What this base is for (injected into the session prompt — be specific)
form.descriptionTemplate:
Purpose: this knowledge base covers [content type, e.g. conventions, processes, FAQs, API docs] for [topic/domain].
When to consult: consult this base first whenever a task involves [scenario keywords].
form.modelSelectTooltip: Model used by AI generate / polish (defaults to the system default)
form.name: Name
form.rootPathHint: Pick an existing local folder as the knowledge base root — it is attached by reference and its structure is never modified; leave empty to auto-provision a managed directory
form.rootPathPlaceholder: Select or paste an absolute folder path, e.g. D:\docs\my-knowledge
form.sourceModeLiveHint: Nothing is fetched at creation — sessions query these URLs as realtime sources. You can still take snapshots manually at any time.
form.sourceModeSnapshotHint: Each URL is fetched and saved as a snapshot document when the base is created (this can take a while); you can refresh the snapshots anytime.
form.sourceRenderedHint: Fetch via a real headless browser (for JS-heavy SPAs); falls back to plain HTTP when no browser backend is enabled
form.sourceUrlInvalid: URL must start with http:// or https://
form.templateOverwriteConfirm: Replace the current description with the template?

inbox.empty: No pending proposals — staged write-backs from sessions show up here for review
inbox.selectProposal: Select a proposal on the left to review its diff

mount.emptyHint:
You don't have any knowledge bases yet.
A knowledge base gives this session extra domain knowledge.
mount.footer: Changes take effect immediately · {{count}} base(s) mounted in this workspace
mount.rootMissingHint: The source directory is missing or unavailable. Restore it before mounting.
mount.scope: Scope: workspace {{path}}. All sessions in this workspace share these mount settings.
mount.title: Mount knowledge
mount.writebackDesc: Let this session write new knowledge back to the bases

newFilePlaceholder: File name or relative path, e.g. concepts.md or api/conventions.md
noFiles: No .md documents yet — drop files into the directory or create one

onboarding.step1Desc: Make a base from scratch, a local folder, or URLs.
onboarding.step2Desc: Add .md documents — or let AI draft an overview and README.
onboarding.step3Desc: Attach it to sessions; the model consults it under .nomi/knowledge/.
onboarding.subtitle: A knowledge base is a directory of Markdown documents you can mount into any session as an extended knowledge source.
onboarding.title: Start managing your own knowledge

selectFile: Select a document on the left to view it

studio.basicInfoHelp: The name identifies the base; the description tells the model when to consult it.
studio.blankNote: The system will create an app-managed Markdown directory. No extra config needed — add .md files afterwards, or let AI draft an overview and README.
studio.descHint: Injected into the session prompt to help the AI decide when to consult this base
studio.descPlaceholder: What this base covers and when to consult it
studio.feishuCredFormRequired: Please fill in all credential fields
studio.feishuCredHint: A credential is a Feishu self-built app's App ID / Secret. It is verified on submission and stored AES-encrypted.
studio.feishuCredPlaceholder: Select a saved Feishu app credential…
studio.feishuCredRequired: Please select or create a Feishu credential
studio.feishuDisabled: Feishu Wiki creation is unavailable for now
studio.footerHint: Name is required; local-folder bases also need a folder path
studio.importMetaPartialFail: Base imported, but name/description failed to save — please fill them in on the detail page
studio.importNote: Restore a .zip exported from another device or base into a new managed base. You can edit and mount it afterwards.
studio.localFolderPlaceholder: Select an existing directory on your computer
studio.localReadonlyNote: The app attaches in read-only mode and never modifies your directory structure. Changes to .md files are reflected automatically.
studio.namePlaceholder: e.g. Team conventions, Product FAQ, Domain glossary
studio.subtitle: Pick a type on the left; the right panel shows only that type’s config
studio.teachHeader: What it is · How to fill · How to use
studio.title: New knowledge base
studio.typeLocalDesc: Reference a directory on your computer
studio.webModeHint: Snapshot: fetch now and store locally; refresh anytime. Live: don’t fetch — sessions query these URLs as realtime sources at runtime.
studio.webUrlRequired: Please enter at least one URL
studio.webUrlInvalid: Invalid URL — must start with http:// or https://: {{url}}

subtitle: Centrally manage your domain knowledge as directories of Markdown documents. Mount a knowledge base into sessions as an extended knowledge source — multiple sessions can reuse the same base, and with write-back enabled a session keeps enriching it. You can also drop .md files into the directory directly.

tags.deleteConfirm: Delete "{{label}}"? It will be removed from all knowledge bases.
tags.empty: No tags yet. Create one below.
tags.modalDesc: Organize knowledge bases with tags. Tags can be renamed, recolored, reordered, or deleted.

title: Knowledge
